v1alpha1.description: KusoEnvironment is one running instance of a KusoService — production or preview.

additionalHosts.description: Extra hostnames routed to this env's pod. Server populates this from KusoService.spec.domains so custom domains attach without losing the auto-generated host.

command.description: argv override; only used when runtime == "worker".

envOverrides.description: Env-var NAMES the user deliberately pinned to this env via the per-env scoped editor. The kuso server's propagation step preserves these env-local values and re-stamps every other service-owned var from the parent KusoService — the explicit marker that tells a deliberate override from a stale inherited seed. Server-managed; the chart does not render it.

healthcheck.description: Resolved HTTP health check (propagated from the service). When `path` is set the chart renders HTTP readiness + liveness probes against it instead of the default TCP readiness/startup probes.

internal.description: When true, skip the Ingress entirely. Service still exists for in-cluster DNS access; no public domain or TLS. Mirrors KusoService.spec.internal.

placement.description: Inherits the parent service placement so the env-helm chart can render nodeSelector + topologySpread. Pruning was the v0.7.x silent-data-loss bug — schema now covers what server-go writes.

privateEgress.description: When true, deny public internet egress for this env's pods. Mirrors KusoService.spec.privateEgress.

publicEnv.description: Env var names baked as __KUSO_RUNTIME_<KEY>__ sentinels at build and substituted with the real per-deploy value at pod start. Mirrored from the parent KusoService.spec.publicEnv. Must exist here because the kuso-server build/deploy path writes env.spec.publicEnv; a missing field makes the apiserver silently prune it and the server boots in degraded mode (readyz=503, writes refused).

release.description:
Pre-deploy release hook mirrored from
KusoService.spec.release by the server. The build
poller reads this off the env CR (already in its
hot path) when deciding whether to run a release
Job before promoting an image.

runtime.description: Mirrors KusoService.spec.runtime so the env helm chart can specialise (e.g. workers skip Service/Ingress/probes).

sharedEnvKeys.description: Mirrored from the parent KusoService.spec.sharedEnvKeys by the kuso server's propagation step. nil = legacy (chart falls back to envFromSecrets blanket mount); non-nil = chart renders individual env entries per key (per-service opt-in).

spreadPolicy.description: How multi-replica pods spread across nodes. "hard" = topologySpreadConstraints DoNotSchedule (replicas forced onto distinct nodes); "soft"/"" = ScheduleAnyway (single-node safe). Server-managed from the live schedulable-node count.

subscribedAddons.description: Mirrored from the parent KusoService.spec.subscribedAddons. nil = legacy auto-mount-all addon-conn secrets; non-nil = operator only includes the listed addons' conn-secrets in envFromSecrets.

tlsHosts.description: Subset of {host, additionalHosts...} eligible for a Let's Encrypt cert. Server populates this using the Mozilla public-suffix list — hosts that aren't public FQDNs (e.g. single-label or reserved suffixes like .local) are filtered out so they don't poison the Ingress's all-or-nothing tls block. Unset on legacy CRs falls back to a coarser chart-level check.

volumes.description: Persistent volumes to mount into the env's pod. Same shape as KusoService.spec.volumes; declared explicitly so the apiserver doesn't prune them.
